title: TILLAMOOK BAY COMMUNITY COLLEGE - 211info
text: TILLAMOOK BAY COMMUNITY COLLEGE TILLAMOOK BAY COMMUNITY COLLEGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of educational, vocational, college credit, and developmental courses, including adult basic education, GED test instruction, continuing education opportunities, and English as a Second Language classes. Campuses are located in Tillamook, Rockaway Beach, and Cloverdale. 4301 Third Street Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm (503) 842-8222 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 842-8222 TTY/TTD (503) 842-2467 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information or to register FEES: Varies by course DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Adult Basic Education Community Colleges English as a Second Language GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - TBCC FOOD PANTRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
